description_long: This is a pair of modern armchairs with a rounded barrel-back design, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The left armchair features a tufted backrest with deep button detailing, while the right armchair has a smooth, unadorned backrest. Both chairs have gently curved armrests that seamlessly integrate into the backrest, creating a cocoon-like seating area. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric with a subtle woven texture, and the seat cushions are integrated into the frame. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and finished in a light wood tone, providing a contemporary contrast to the dark upholstery. These armchairs are suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor patios under shelter.
description: A pair of modern, rounded armchairs in dark gray fabric, one with tufted detailing and both with light wood tapered legs. The design is contemporary and inviting, with integrated seat cushions and a soft, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both armchairs side by side, highlighting the difference between the tufted and smooth backrests and the wide, inviting seat area.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the curved, enveloping shape of the armrests and backrest, as well as the slender, angled wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded backs of both chairs, with the left chair showing a subtle seam and the right chair a smoother finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the deep tufting of the left chair's backrest and the continuous curve of the armrest and backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: curved and upholstered, integrated with backrest
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium height, left chair tufted, right chair smooth
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted on left chair, solid woven fabric on right chair
